functions.functionContentWithoutFormatting: { return( (base == BGCRC_CPU_BASE) ); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((nmiConfig == BGCRC_NMI_ENABLE) || (nmiConfig == BGCRC_NMI_DISABLE)); ASSERT((emuCtrl == BGCRC_EMUCTRL_FREE) || (emuCtrl == BGCRC_EMUCTRL_SOFT)); // // Set emulation control and NMI configuration // EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_CTRL1) = (nmiConfig << BGCRC_CTRL1_NMIDIS_S) | emuCtrl; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); // // Enable watchdog // EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_WD_CFG) = BGCRC_WD_ENABLE; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); // // Disable watchdog // EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_WD_CFG) = BGCRC_WD_DISABLE; EDIS; }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(max > min); // // Set the min and max values // EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_WD_MIN) = min; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_WD_MAX) = max; EDIS; }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((blockSize > BGCRC_SIZE_BYTES_0) && (blockSize <= BGCRC_SIZE_KBYTES(256U))); ASSERT((mode == BGCRC_SCRUB_MODE) || (mode == BGCRC_CRC_MODE)); // // Set the start address and size of the block. Set the mode of operation // EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_START_ADDR) = startAddr; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_CTRL2) = ((blockSize - 1U) << BGCRC_CTRL2_BLOCK_SIZE_S) | (mode << BGCRC_CTRL2_SCRUB_MODE_S); EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); return(HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_WD_CNT)); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((intFlags & (BGCRC_TEST_DONE | BGCRC_ALL_ERROR_FLAGS)) == intFlags); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_INTEN) |= intFlags; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((intFlags & (BGCRC_TEST_DONE | BGCRC_ALL_ERROR_FLAGS)) == intFlags); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_INTEN) &= ~intFlags; EDIS; }
{ return(HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_INTFLG)); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((intFlags & (BGCRC_GLOBAL_INT | BGCRC_TEST_DONE | BGCRC_ALL_ERROR_FLAGS)) == intFlags); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_INTCLR) = intFlags; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((intFlags & (BGCRC_TEST_DONE | BGCRC_ALL_ERROR_FLAGS)) == intFlags); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_INTFRC) = intFlags; EDIS; }
{ return(HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_NMIFLG)); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((nmiFlags & BGCRC_ALL_ERROR_FLAGS) == nmiFlags); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_NMICLR) = nmiFlags; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((nmiFlags & BGCRC_ALL_ERROR_FLAGS) == nmiFlags); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_NMIFRC) = nmiFlags; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_GOLDEN) = crcVal; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_EN) = BGCRC_START_KEY; EDIS; }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_CTRL2) = (HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_CTRL2) & ~BGCRC_CTRL2_TEST_HALT_M) | (BGCRC_HALT_KEY << BGCRC_CTRL2_TEST_HALT_S); EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_CTRL2) &= ~BGCRC_CTRL2_TEST_HALT_M; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); return(HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_EN) & BGCRC_EN_RUN_STS); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_SEED) = seed; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); return(HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_RESULT)); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); return(HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_CURR_ADDR)); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_LOCK) |= regs; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_LOCK) &= ~regs; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(BGCRC_isBaseValid(base)); EALLOW; HWREG(base + BGCRC_O_COMMIT) |= regs; EDIS; }
